raw: This pass is provided in partnership with the Massachusetts Department of Conservation and Recreation and the National Park Service, with the generous support of Boston Harbor City Cruises. This program offers library cardholders the opportunity to purchase tickets at a 50% discount using a unique promo code. Ferries are boarded at Long Wharf North in Downtown Boston. 2026 Season Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays You will receive a promo code in your confirmation email (click on "Access pass") when you reserve the pass with the library. You can find online booking instructions, maps, activities, and more in this resource folder . There is nothing to pick up at the library. Passes are available to Winchester residents only. Call the desk at 781-721-7171 x320 for assistance.
